title: Snowy's Christmas Mod
description: This is a mod I have created for Christmas. Includes several Christmas items and 2 structures.
body:
This is a mod I have created for Christmas. 
Includes several Christmas items and 2 structures.
Includes:
- Gingerbread
- Gingerbread House
- Eggnog
- Whisky
- Christmas Music Disc(All I Want for Christmas is You Noteblock Cover)
- 2 Christmas Paintings(Use vanilla painting to get)
- A Christmas Hat
- Disappointing sweater and pants
- Present Structure(contains loot chest inside)
- And Christmas Tree! (contains a beacon and several loot chests around it)

All structures spawns naturally in the overworld via datapacks.
All items craftable via survival. Recipes will show up in crafting tables.
